title: Peppery Velvety Tempeh Midnight-Craving Pasta
description: A vegetarian-friendly Italian dish featuring peppery tempeh in a velvety pasta sauce that satisfies the midnight cravings.
instructions: Prepare the tempeh by slicing it into thin strips and lightly sear them in a pan with olive oil until golden brown on both sides.
In a separate saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add garlic cloves, red chili flakes, and Italian parsley, sautéing for about 2 minutes until fragrant.

Pour white wine vinegar into the saucepan and bring it to a simmer, allowing the flavors to meld together for another minute. Stir in vegetable broth, nutritional yeast, salt, and garlic powder, continuing to cook until the mixture thickens slightly.
Toss the seared tempeh with the saucepan’s contents, ensuring all pieces are well coated. Let it rest for a few minutes before serving over your choice of pasta.
